_comment: Example tool definition for the Anthropic Messages API. Wire into a request as `tools: [<this object>]`. See rules/tool-use.md for correctness rules.
name: search_files
description: Search files in the user's project matching a query string. Returns an array of paths with snippets. Use when the user asks 'find', 'search for', 'where is X in the code'.

query.description: Search query — file name pattern or content substring.

max_results.description: Maximum number of matches to return.
